ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the college basketball team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team this metric belongs to */,
  "kenpom" INTEGER /* KenPom ranking score */,
  "torvik" INTEGER /* Torvik ranking score */,
  "haslam" INTEGER /* Haslam ranking score */,
  "average" REAL /* Average metric score */,
  "preseason" INTEGER /* Preseason predicted ranking */,
  "diff" REAL /* Difference in predicted ranking */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season of the metric */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Home or away game */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Win or loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Champion of the season */,
  "runner_up" TEXT /* Runner-up of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team being analyzed */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analytics findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analytics findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "year_joined" INTEGER /* Year the player joined the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of games won */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of games lost */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password (hashed) for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
